name: Pareve Chocolate Mouse
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate with hot coffee over very hot water. In a microwave, melt the chocolate on High for 1 minute, then stir in the coffee.
2. Add the orange liquor to the melted chocolate mixture.
3. Beat egg yolks and add them to the chocolate mixture, beating well.
4. Beat egg whites separately and fold into the chocolate mixture until no streaks remain.
5. Pour the chilled mixture into sherbet glasses.
6. Chill completely before serving.
Garnish with a dollop of non-dairy Cool Whip and shaved chocolate if desired. Serve in stemmed glasses.
